question_frequency.rationale: The Pair asked zero didactic questions. It immediately presented a complete solution with explanation rather than engaging the user at any decision point (e.g., short-circuit ordering, the % 400 exception logic, alternative formulations).

question_quality.rationale: No choices were framed at all. The two-option format the project is designed around was completely absent — no fork on operator ordering, no alternative phrasings of the leap-year rule, no trade-off surfaced.

scaffolding.rationale: There is no scaffolding because there is no progression of questions. The Pair dumped the full answer in turn 1, which is the maximum spoiler.

flow_and_tone.rationale: Tone is warm and the explanation is clear and accurate, but the 'flow' is monologue, not dialogue. The user's only contribution was 'Perfect!' — there is no back-and-forth at all.

effectiveness.rationale: Baseline run — productivity criteria pinned to 3 by convention (the baseline IS the reference; judging it comparatively is meaningless).

friction.rationale: Baseline run — productivity criteria pinned to 3 by convention (the baseline IS the reference; judging it comparatively is meaningless).
